panels.title: Consumer Crashes (kafkajs)
panels.description: Consumer perdeu conexão com Kafka — groupId indica qual etapa parou

panels.title: Connection Errors (Kafka down)
panels.description: Erros de conexão com o broker — o que acontece quando o Kafka está fora

targets.expr: {container=~"platform-(odyssey|atreides)-1"} | json | message=~".*Connection error.*|.*Connection timeout.*|.*Failed to connect.*" | line_format "[{{.container}}] {{.message}}"

panels.title: Consumer Restarting
panels.description: Consumers reiniciando após crash — indica instabilidade

targets.expr: {container=~"platform-(odyssey|atreides)-1"} | json | message=~"\\[Consumer\\] Restarting.*" | line_format "[{{.container}}] groupId={{.groupId}} | retryCount={{.retryCount}} | retryTime={{.retryTime}}ms"

panels.title: Mensagens enviadas para DLQ (handler falhou 3x)
panels.description: Falhas na lógica do handler — tópico de origem e payload disponíveis no detalhe

targets.expr: {container=~"platform-(odyssey|atreides)-1"} | json | msg="consumer: message failed after retries, sending to DLQ" | line_format "[{{.container}}] topic={{.topic}} | name={{.name}} | eventId={{.eventId}} | erro={{.err}}"
